_comment: Real published numbers the synthetic DGP must reproduce. See DESIGN.md section 5. Each target carries a tolerance used by the Phase 2 calibration gate. Sources are the published studies in DESIGN.md section 11.

targets.description: Fraction of SIDS cases found prone, pre vs post Back-to-Sleep
Fraction of control infants usually prone, pre vs post
US SIDS deaths per 1000 live births, pre vs post
Adjusted odds ratio for prone, and the RISE across the campaign (falsification gate)
Maternal smoking OR (~2), dose-response to ~12.7 at >20/day
Population attributable fraction of smoking, rising as prone removed (falsification gate)
Low brainstem 5-HT binding: controls vs cases
OR for usually-supine babies placed/found prone once (external check)
